text:
Thank you to everyone who came to today’s Long Island meetup. ❤️

Seeing so many happy Shih Tzus and their humans together is something I’ll never get tired of. What started as a love for one little Ewok has grown into an incredible community, and I’m so grateful for every one of you.

Thank you for making today so special. ✨A special THANK YOU to Jen for working the megaphone 📣 Until next time. Mark your calendars 📅 Sunday October 11th, NYC.

#shihtzusofinstagram #shihtzugram #shihtzu #shihtzunation
